books.citation_template: Upton, R. et al. (2011). AHP: Botanical Pharmacognosy. pp. {pages}.
books.notes: Section 2 Botanical Microscopy Atlas. Many pages are image-only (microscopy plates). Entries by Latin binomial.
Alphabetical index of botanical names, common names, and synonyms with printed page numbers.

books.citation_template: Wichtl, M. (1994). Herbal Drugs and Phytopharmaceuticals. pp. {pages}.
books.notes: TOC with Latin drug names (e.g., Millefolii herba). Monographs include pharmacognosy, TLC, indications.

books.file: Atlas of Microscopy of Medicinal Plants, Culinary Herbs and -- Betty P_ Jackson, Derek W_ Snowdon.pdf
books.citation_template: Jackson, B.P. & Snowdon, D.W. (1990). Atlas of Microscopy. pp. {pages}.
books.notes: Contents by common name. Each entry is typically 2 pages (description + plate).

books.citation_template: Council of Europe. (2004). European Pharmacopoeia 5th Ed. {ep_drug_name}.
books.notes: Non-linear page offsets. Uses ep_herbal_lookup.json mapping drug names to actual PDF pages. Herbal entries filtered from full index by suffixes (herba, radix, folium, flos, fructus, cortex, rhizoma, semen, aetheroleum).
